summary: Phase 1 E2E Customer Journey Testing - Konekt B2B Platform. Tested guest browsing, marketplace, services, checkout, payment methods, login, and registration flows. Most critical flows working correctly. Key findings: Marketplace has no product data (empty), Services page works, Quote request form works, Customer login works, Checkout flow works with Bank Transfer as only active payment method, Registration page works.

minor.issue: Returns 422 when 'q' parameter is missing - should be optional
Returns empty items array - no marketplace product data seeded

integration_issues.issue: Some service slugs like 'maintenance' return 'Service not found' - slug mismatch between services list and detail lookup

tests: Country selector modal appears for new visitors
Dar es Salaam region selection works
Shows 'No listings found' - no product data seeded
Form fields: Full Name, Email, Phone, Company, Country, Region, Service Category, Details, Urgency, Budget
Form fields: Full Name, Email, Password, Phone (optional), Company (optional)
Payment selection page shows all methods
Mobile Money shows 'Coming Soon' and 'Not Available Yet'
Tanzania bank details displayed: CRDB BANK, KONEKT LIMITED, 015C8841347002, CORUTZTZ
Bank transfer page loads after selecting Bank Transfer
Bank details displayed: CRDB BANK, KONEKT LIMITED, 015C8841347002, Main Branch, CORUTZTZ
Demo customer has no invoices to test payment flow
Guests can access checkout page directly
Login button visible in header for guests

action_items: CRITICAL: Seed marketplace product data for TZ country to enable full product browsing and cart testing
FIX: Service detail page slug lookup - some services like 'maintenance' return 'Service not found'
OPTIONAL: Make /api/public-marketplace/search 'q' parameter optional to avoid 422 errors
critical_code_review_comments: Bank details in payment flow show CRDB BANK (015C8841347002, CORUTZTZ) but requirement mentions National Bank of Commerce (015103005556, NBCTZTZT) - verify correct bank details
Marketplace has no product data - need seed data for E2E testing

success_rate.frontend: 85% (11/13 features working, 2 blocked by missing data)

seed_data_creation: Test cart items created via localStorage for checkout testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Customer Journey testing complete. Key blockers: 1) No marketplace product data for TZ - cannot test full product browsing/detail/add-to-cart flow, 2) No invoices for demo customer - cannot test invoice payment flow. Checkout and payment selection flows work correctly with test cart data. Bank Transfer is the only active payment method. Next phase should test: Invoice generation after order, Payment proof submission, Payment timeline updates.

bank_details_verification.note: Bank details in app differ from requirement - main agent should verify correct bank details
